title: INDIGENT IGNITION INTERLOCK DEVICE PROGRAM - 211info
text: OREGON HEALTH AUTHORITY INDIGENT IGNITION INTERLOCK DEVICE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a program that pays for the costs associated with installation, monitoring, and removal of ignition interlock devices (IID). 500 Summer Street NE E-20 Salem, OR 973011097 Eligibility: Individuals who are required by an Oregon court to install an IID as the result of a Driving Under the Influence of Intoxicants (DUII) ticket and are currently receiving SNAP benefits Hours: No standard hours Email (800) 634-3077 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (800) 634-3077 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of enrollment in SNAP benefits AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: DUI Offender Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER REGULATION - PREADOPTION BIRTH RECORDS HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - MONKEYPOX VACCINE LOCATOR If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON HEALTH AUTHORITY
